ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Customer's gender */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Customer's loyalty points */,
  "communication_preferences" TEXT /* Customer's communication preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (length, width, height) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the purchase */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the purchase */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the purchase */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., processing, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES customers ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer with the preference */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of products the customer prefers */,
  "preference_details" TEXT /* Details of the customer's preferences */,
  "preference_type" TEXT /* Type of preference (e.g., product, service) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES customers ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the customer's review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as unhelpful */,
  "moderation_status" TEXT /* Moderation status of the review (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "moderated_by" TEXT /* ID of the moderator who reviewed the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES customers ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
